VAL-KEY-002.title: POST /api/keys creates key with correct format

steps.action: Verify full key shown only in creation response
steps.expected: Response includes 'key' field with full key

steps.action: Verify DB stores short_token and SHA-256 hash
steps.expected: DB row has short_token and 64-char hex long_token_hash

VAL-KEY-002.evidence: curl POST /api/keys -> 201, key=tot_live_8fIEEyiD_uuFKNAPcchNzVH7CkVtPvSPB1bHQAe5V. DB: short_token=8fIEEyiD, long_token_hash is 64-char SHA-256 hex.

VAL-KEY-003.title: GET /api/keys lists without secrets

steps.action: Verify fields: id, name, short_token, scopes, status, expires_at, last_used_at
steps.observed: All fields present: id, name, short_token, scopes, status, expires_at, last_used_at, created_at

steps.action: Verify full key is NEVER included
steps.expected: No 'key' field, no tot_live_ values in any field
steps.observed: No 'key' field in listing. No tot_live_ values found in any field.

VAL-KEY-003.evidence: curl GET /api/keys -> 200. Response includes id, name, short_token, scopes, status, expires_at, last_used_at, created_at. No 'key' field or full key value present.

VAL-KEY-004.title: PATCH /api/keys/{id} revokes a key

steps.action: Create key and verify it works

VAL-KEY-004.evidence: curl PATCH /api/keys/{id} -> 200 revoked. DB revoked_at set. Subsequent Bearer auth -> 401. Re-revoke -> 200 (idempotent, same revoked_at).

VAL-KEY-005.title: API key authenticates via Bearer header

steps.action: Create API key with keys:read scope

VAL-KEY-005.evidence: curl GET /api/keys with Authorization: Bearer tot_live_QLhM4UVH_Oepm... -> 200. last_used_at updated. authMethod=api_key confirmed via key.used audit event with actor_type=api_key.

VAL-KEY-009.title: CSRF exemption for API key auth

steps.action: POST /api/keys with API key Bearer auth, no X-CSRF-Token header
PATCH /api/keys/{id} with API key Bearer auth, no X-CSRF-Token header

VAL-KEY-009.evidence: curl POST /api/keys without X-CSRF-Token with Bearer API key -> 201. curl PATCH /api/keys/{id} without X-CSRF-Token with Bearer API key -> 200. Both mutating requests succeed without CSRF token when using API key auth.

VAL-KEY-012.title: API key audit events

steps.observed: 5 key.created events: 3 with actor_type=owner (session-created), 1 with actor_type=api_key (key-created)
Session-based operations have actor_type=owner, API key-based operations have actor_type=api_key

VAL-KEY-012.evidence: GET /api/audit -> 200. Found key.created (5), key.revoked (2), key.used (5) events. actor_type=owner for session-initiated ops, actor_type=api_key for key-initiated ops. All three event types present with correct actor_type.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed (VAL-KEY-002, VAL-KEY-003, VAL-KEY-004, VAL-KEY-005, VAL-KEY-009, VAL-KEY-012). API key CRUD, Bearer authentication, CSRF exemption, and audit events all working correctly.
